title: Craftable Ender Pearls
description: Adds a recipe for ender pearls which take 1 lapis and one obsidian to craft, useful if you don't want to grind.
body:
Adds a recipe for ender pearls which take 1 lapis and one obsidian to craft, useful if you don't want to grind.


![Ender Pearl Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa62c49ce82bcd00d2cef649c18855d6b09f607d.png)
